heading: KYC verification
intro: Level 0 is your email login. Verify your phone for Level 1, upload ID or company documents for Level 2 (admin review). Level 3 is assigned by admin for trusted sellers.

phone.heading: Phone verification (Level 1)
phone.intro: International format with country code (e.g. +261…). Independent of document review — you can reach Level 2 via admin approval without verifying phone first.
phone.label: Mobile number

toast.devOnly: SMS not configured — use the dev code shown below.
toast.verified: Phone verified. KYC level is now {level}.

documents.levelsExplainer: Level 0 — email login. Level 1 — phone verified. Level 2 — ID / documents approved by admin. Level 3 — premium (admin only). Uploads stay pending until an admin approves; phone verification is optional and separate.

toast.tooBig: File must be 5 MB or smaller.
toast.badType: Only images and PDF files are allowed.
toast.uploaded: Document uploaded — pending admin review for Level 2.
